message:
feat(G8): anytime-valid regression detection with conformal/e-value guardrails

Adds RegressionMonitor combining conformal calibration envelopes
(HealthThresholdCalibrator) with e-process sequential testing (EProcess)
for statistically principled RaptorQ decode performance regression detection.

Key additions:
- RegressionMonitor: bridges conformal calibration + e-process martingale
  to DecodeStats metrics (gauss_ops, dense_core, inactivated, pivots, etc.)
- RegressionVerdict: Accept/Calibrating/Warning/Regressed state machine
- Per-metric e-value accumulation for anytime-valid evidence
- Conformal thresholds with distribution-free coverage guarantees
- Structured NDJSON logging with schema raptorq-g8-anytime-regression-v1
- Regime state covariate from F6 detector in regression reports
- 11 unit tests: calibration lifecycle, regression detection, false-alarm
  resistance, evidence reset, deterministic replay, verdict ordering

Closes asupersync-3fvti

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
